popularStory.headline: Timeline of the life of John Harmon of Springfield, MA
popularStory.description:
Timeline: 
1609-1617 Sometime between these years, both John and Elizabeth were born--probably in England. The IGI lists one John Harmon born in this time period. John Harmon christened 28 Jan 1617 at …

associatedMedia.headline: HARMON:  John of Springfield and Descendants in Suffield, CT cemetery
associatedMedia.description:
This Monument is in the West Suffield, Connecticut Cemetery in honor of the descendants of John Harmon who were
the first settlers of Suffield. Its backside (shown above) reads:
John Harmon-England-1617; Springfield, Mass.- 1661
Joseph 1 Springfield-Mass–1646-Suffield, Conn-1729 st
Nathaniel-Springfield-Mass–1653-Suffield-Conn-1685   [wrong death date!  This is marriage date]
Brothers–First Settlers of Suffield, Connecticut
Israel 1 -1753-1831-Soldier Am. Rev. War st
Israel 2nd-1784-1844
Israel 3 -Suffield-Conn-1834-Springfield-Mass 1913 rd
This stone is erected by Israel Harmon 3rd
The front side reads:
In Memoriam
Israel Harmon 1784-1844
Paulina Harmon His Wife 1801-1868
Her children rise up and call her blessed
George W. 1821-1888 Eliza 1822-1870 Oliver 1824-1856 Martha 1829-1857
Israel 1834-1913 Julius Alonzo 1837-1895 Julia Annette 1837-1867

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Burt於1599年7月16日在英國戴文哈波頓受洗時，他的父親Henry Burt33歲，母親Mrs. Henry Burt29歲。他於1619年12月28日與Eulalia Marche在英國戴文迪恩 普萊爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他於1640年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德。他去世於1662年4月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年62歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Burt于1599年7月16日在英国戴文哈波頓受洗时，他的父亲Henry Burt33岁，母亲Mrs. Henry Burt29岁。他于1619年12月28日与Eulalia Marche在英国戴文迪恩 普萊爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他于1640年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德。他去世于1662年4月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年62岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Burt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): variant of   Bird  ,   Bright  , or   Burd  .
German: Middle High German burt ‘that which is due or proper’, therefore a nickname for someone who has fulfilled his obligations properly.
Jewish (from Poland and Ukraine): variant of   Burd  .

variants.name: Bird
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a young or a small and slender person, from Middle English brid, bird, burd (Old English bird, brid, perhaps also byrd) ‘bird, young bird’, also ‘young man, young woman, child’.

Irish: Anglicized form of a number of Irish names erroneously thought to contain the element éan ‘bird’, in particular Ó hÉinigh (see Heagney ), Ó hÉanna (see Heaney ), Ó hÉanacháin (see Heneghan ), and Mac an Déaghanaigh (see McEneaney ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘bird’, as for example German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Vogel , French Loiseau , Czech Ptáček (see Ptacek ) and Pták, Polish Ptak .

variants.name: Birt
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places in the Rhineland named Birth or Birten.
In some cases also Croatian: occupational name from birt ‘inn-keeper’, a regional or colloquial word of German origin (see Wirt ).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Burt was christened on 16 July 1599, in Harberton, Devon, England, his father, Henry Burt, was 33 and his mother, Mrs. Henry Burt, was 29. He married Eulalia Marche on 28 December 1619, in Dean Prior, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 9 daughters. He lived in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1640. He died on 30 April 1662, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 62, and was buried in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Burt a été baptisé le 16 juillet 1599, à Harberton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Henry Burt, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Henry Burt, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Eulalia Marche le 28 décembre 1619, à Dean Prior, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 9 filles. Il a vécu à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1640. Il est décédé le 30 avril 1662, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Burt am 16. Juli 1599 in Harberton, Devon, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater Henry Burt 33 und seine Mutter Mrs. Henry Burt 29. Er hat am 28. Dezember 1619 in Dean Prior, Devon, England Eulalia Marche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 9 Töchter. 1640 hat er in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 30. April 1662 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Burt è stato battezzato il 16 luglio 1599 nel Harberton, Devon, England, il suo padre, Henry Burt, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Henry Burt, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Eulalia Marche il 28 dicembre 1619, nel Dean Prior, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 9 figlie. Vissuto a Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1640. Morì il 30 aprile 1662, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Burtが1599年7月16日にイギリスデボンハーバートンで洗礼を受けた時，父Henry Burtは33歳，母Mrs. Henry Burtは29歳であった。1619年12月28日にイギリスデボンディーン プリオルでEulalia Marcheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1640年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドに住んでいた。彼は1662年4月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで62歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドスプリングフィールド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Burt(이)가 1599년 7월 16일 영국 데폰 하르버턴에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Burt(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Henry Burt(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1619년 12월 28일 영국 데폰 디 프리어에서 Eulalia Marche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 1640년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 살았다. 그는 1662년 4월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Burt foi batizado em 16 de julho de 1599, em Harberton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Burt, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Henry Burt, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Eulalia Marche em 28 de dezembro de 1619, em Dean Prior, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele viveu em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1640. Ele faleceu em 30 de abril de 1662, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Burt был крещен 16 июля 1599 г. в местности харбиртон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Burt было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Henry Burt, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Eulalia Marche 28 декабря 1619 г. в местности дин приор, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 9 дочерей. Он жил в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1640 году. Он умер 30 апреля 1662 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности спрингфиелд кеметири, спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Burt se bautizó el 16 de julio de 1599, en Harberton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Burt, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mrs. Henry Burt, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Eulalia Marche el 28 de diciembre de 1619, en Dean Prior, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 9 hijas. Vivió en Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1640. Murió el 30 de abril de 1662, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
